positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a celestial forest. Silhouettes of whimsical, stylized flora and fauna, such as glowing mushroom clusters, crescent moon moths, and meandering root systems, are rendered against a deep, twilight indigo background. The overall style is line-art illustration combined with negative space graphic design, utilizing limited color palettes of ethereal cyan, pale gold, and forest emerald. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for full apparel printing. The composition should feature strong contrast between the light glowing elements and the dark background, giving a clean, graphic, yet organic feel. Clean vector art aesthetic, high resolution, perfect for printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, dirty, cropped
